overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring a foggy Victorian-era dockyard at night. The character walks along wooden wharves, through narrow alleys, and enters buildings with atmospheric lighting from street lamps and fires.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden wharf transitioning to narrow alley

events.description: exits covered wooden walkway into narrow cobblestone alley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden planks through covered dock area and into narrow alley

entered.detail: wooden roof covering the dock walkway with support beams
dark wooden railings lining both sides of the walkway
wooden shop front with canvas awnings and signage
warm glowing gas lamp on wooden post
stacked wooden crates and barrels along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered wooden dock area with warm lamplight illuminating the planks. The scene transitions into a narrow alley with cobblestone ground and wooden buildings on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock with industrial waterfront backdrop

events.description: emerges from narrow alley onto open wooden dock with view of industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along open dock planks while approaching the waterfront edge

entered.detail: fog-shrouded industrial buildings with chimneys and distant lights across the water
dark foggy night sky visible above the industrial skyline
stacked wooden barrels along the dock railing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open wooden dock with a wide view of foggy industrial buildings across the water. Warm street lamps line the dock while the fog obscures the distant skyline.

events.description: character turns to look at water and industrial background before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking along dock edge, pausing to look at the water and industrial view, then approaching a building entrance

entered.detail: dark wooden doorway leading into a building with steps
stacked crates near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dock edge, turning to observe the foggy industrial waterfront before approaching a wooden building entrance. Street lamps provide warm pools of light against the dark fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden building interior to red-lit alley with fire

events.description: exits building into narrow alley illuminated by red emergency lighting and fire

agents.ego_description: entering a dark wooden building, moving through interior rooms, then exiting into a red-lit alley with burning debris

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame leading into the building interior
rough wooden plank walls inside the building
burning fire pit casting red light in the alley
narrow passage with red emergency lighting and burning debris

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark wooden building with plank walls and floors, moves through the interior, then exits into a narrow alley illuminated by red light from burning fires and emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop with machinery to cobblestone street

events.description: enters workshop containing large machinery and work tables
exits workshop back onto cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: entering a workshop with large machinery, examining the interior, then exiting back to the cobblestone street

entered.detail: large industrial wheel mechanism with gears in the workshop
interior walls of the workshop with tools and equipment
work table with various items in the workshop center

segments.scene_description: The character enters a workshop containing large industrial machinery and wooden work tables, then exits back onto a cobblestone street lined with wooden buildings and street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy Victorian dockyard that shifts from warm, lamplit wharves into dark industrial interiors and fire-lit alleys. It begins with the character walking through a covered wooden dock area before transitioning into a narrow cobblestone alley flanked by wooden buildings. As the camera emerges onto an open dock, the view expands to reveal a foggy industrial skyline across the water, illuminated by pools of warm street light. The scene then shifts inward as the character enters a dark wooden building and moves through its plank-walled interior, exiting into a narrow alley bathed in the red glow of burning fires. Finally, the camera follows the character through a workshop filled with large industrial machinery before returning to a cobblestone street lined with wooden buildings and street lamps.
